title: Verify trial widget displays correct remaining days on Day 0
description: Test that the persistent trial widget on homepage shows accurate remaining trial days (6 days) for a new trial user
preconditions: User has activated a new 7-day trial

steps.description: 1. User activates a 7-day trial with ₹1 payment
3. Locate the trial widget in header area
4. Verify the displayed remaining days count

expected_result: Widget displays 'Trial Mode: 6 Days Remaining' with shield/clock icon and 'Manage Control Center' link
